description: A new settlement named 'Nova Cartografia' has been officially established in Brazil and needs to be added to the geospatial database through GeoServer's WFS-T (Transactional Web Feature Service) interface. GeoServer is running at http://localhost:8080/geoserver with admin credentials admin / Admin123!. The workspace 'ne' contains the layer 'ne_populated_places' backed by a PostGIS datastore ('postgis_ne'). Insert a new point feature into the ne:ne_populated_places layer with the following attributes: name 'Nova Cartografia', nameascii 'Nova Cartografia', adm0name 'Brazil', featurecla 'Populated place', pop_max 45000, latitude -15.7801, longitude -47.9292, and a Geometry Point at longitude -47.9292, latitude -15.7801 (EPSG:4326). Save the constructed WFS-T transaction XML to ~/wfst_insert.xml and the transaction response to ~/wfst_response.xml.
